settings.bottom_text: Meet the artisans who perfected stone veneer.

settings.heading: We elevate masonry beyond material into experience.
settings.text:
Our stone, brick, and architectural elements are meticulously engineered to meet the standards of today’s most discerning architects, designers, and builders. Each piece is crafted with a balance of artisan beauty and advanced concrete technology...delivering refined aesthetics with unmatched durability and performance.

We don’t manufacture stone; we design masonry veneers that push the boundaries of what’s possible through proprietary innovations, bold design thinking, and a relentless commitment to precision.

With Creative Mines, you’ll discover materials that inspire design, stand the test of time, and elevate the client experience at every touchpoint.

settings.heading: Responsibility. It's what makes us better.
settings.text:
Masonry veneer should not only be suitable for deserving architectural styles, but respectful of the environment. We get that. That's why our products are designed with sustainability in mind and can contribute to earning LEED-certified points in several key categories. Our products are completely recyclable, reduce waste, reduce carbon footprint compared to clay brick and contribute to the reduction of natural stone excavation around the world.

Innovation is about engineering materials that elevate the craft and stand up to the demands of the built environment.

settings.heading: Pozzolan - Our Secret Ingredient
settings.text: Like the structures of Ancient Rome, Creative Mines masonry veneer is the only manufactured stone company using pozzolan - a natural additive found in icons like the Colosseum. Designed to outperform and outlast all other manufactured stone companies with unrivaled durability.

settings.heading: Tour Our Factory
settings.text: At Creative Mines, we’re driven to craft masonry that looks exceptional and performs even better. Our artisans, engineers, and technical pros share the same mindset; build it right the first time, with an obsessive eye for beauty, detail, and design.
